map_caption: Annualized municipal incidence of probable acute/subacute paracoccidioidomycosis in Brazil for Overall period | 1998-2024. Incidence was calculated as the total number of records divided by summed population person-years and multiplied by 100,000. Municipal polygons are colored by annualized incidence; state and national boundaries are overlaid only from a light local boundary layer to avoid plotting municipal edges.
